## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Nicolas Castellanos to growthx.ai's engineering team and provide an overview of the company's projects and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai has three main projects: Atlas (client management), Flow (workflow engine), and Flow Studio (workflow creation environment)](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [The company is focusing on scaling its agency business to $10-20M revenue and developing a task hub for efficient task allocation](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Nicolas will be working across client ops engineering, Atlas development, and potentially the Flow framework](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [The company aims to create an opinionated AI-based feature development platform, competing with tools like LangChain and Mage.ai](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Topics

### Company Projects Overview

  - [Atlas (atlas.growthx.ai): Rails app for client management](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [Features: Artifacts (canonical documents), Projects (pipelines and workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [Pipelines: YAML-based, automated execution with human review steps](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Flow: TypeScript app for workflow execution](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
      - [Uses Temporal for workflow orchestration](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [Workflows are code-based (TypeScript) with XML documentation](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Flow Studio: Rails app for workflow creation and visualization](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [No database, consumes data from Temporal](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

### Workflow and Pipeline Structure

  - [Workflows are coded in TypeScript with activities, prompts, and XML documentation](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Pipelines are defined in YAML, specifying steps that map to workflow functions](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Steps can send data to the output, allowing flexible data composition](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Two main pipeline types: editorial creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### Future Development Plans

  - [Improve Atlas for agency scalability (target: $10-20M revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Develop a task hub for efficient task allocation to writers and publishers](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Enhance the Flow product to become a general-purpose AI feature development platform](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Create a more user-friendly workflow creation environment (similar to Bolt or Webflow for React)](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Linear project created for Nicolas with onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Learning the Flow project milestone with 7 tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [Nicolas will join the client ops engineering team for at least one cycle](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [An onboarding buddy will be assigned for additional support](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to add Nicolas to GitHub repositories](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Assign an onboarding buddy for Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Nicolas to complete onboarding tasks in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Join tomorrow's client ops engineering team cycle kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Review provided documentation and videos](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Begin learning the Flow project and creating test workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xxEDkXyjqjjD9yzQq8NRsA3zdmSNxfbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
